title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!
